message:
fix(mvcc): remove .expect() on scheduler lock after switch to non-poisoning mutex

The scheduler's .lock() method no longer returns a Result after migrating
from std::sync::Mutex to a non-poisoning mutex. This removes 23 instances
of .expect("scheduler lock not poisoned") across ffs-block tests,
ffs-mvcc source, and ffs-mvcc stress tests that would now fail to compile.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
